metadata.description: Ryan Taylor's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: mac-notifications
plugins.description: macOS system sounds for Claude Code lifecycle events — distinct sounds when Claude finishes, needs attention, requests permission, or completes a task.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Claude Code integration for Obsidian vaults.

plugins.name: claude-code-observability
plugins.description: Local Arize Phoenix lifecycle management and bundled MCP server for Claude Code observability. Requires the claude-code-tracing companion plugin for span emission.
